overview: I built a conversation history manager and feature spec generator using the Claude API, hitting a 30K token rate limit and learning that semantic anchors like 'McKinsey-style' deliver outsized quality per token.

keyPoints.title: Hit 30K token rate limit; built sliding-window context manager
Adding Q&A step cut hallucinations, improved 4,000-token spec output
AI shifts PM thinking to token budgets, velocity, and unit economics
Claude's sycophancy makes honest debate unreliable
